name: Chemistry Concepts Lab
topic_groups: Materials, states of matter, solubility, mixtures, separation, pH and indicators
Atoms, molecules, compounds, chemical symbols, reactions, balancing equations
Acids/bases, salts, corrosion, metals/non-metals, carbon compounds, everyday chemistry
Strong safety boundaries: no tasting, no unknown liquids, no bleach/acid/cleaner mixing
fixes: Improved particle model wording: solid particles vibrate about fixed positions.
Improved water vapour/steam wording and heat-transfer wording.
Strengthened chemical safety and simplified-model caveats.
limitations: No unsupervised experiments with unknown chemicals, cleaners, acids, bases, heat, glass, or flames.
